name: blip-raycast
description: Send files and folders to Blip from Raycast.
author: astroboii47
title: Blip

commands.name: send-to-blip
commands.title: Send to Blip
commands.description: Pick a file or folder and send it to Blip. Requires Raycast Accessibility permission.

commands.name: send-selected-finder-item
commands.title: Send Selected Finder Item to Blip
commands.description: Send the current Finder selection to Blip. Requires Raycast Accessibility permission.
